-- path: /repo/src/analysis/go/parser/mod.rs
use crate::analysis::Error;

fn run() {
    let _ = Error::parser_configuration();
}
-- path: /repo/src/analysis/mod.rs
pub use error::Error;
mod error;
-- path: /repo/src/analysis/error.rs
pub struct Error;

impl Error {
    pub fn parser_configuration() -> Self {
        Self
    }
}
